## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] `./gradlew lintDebug`
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug`

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and follows the existing Kotlin and Compose style.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior or the PR explains why tests are not applicable.
- [ ] No APKs, model files, keystores, tokens, or local configuration are committed.
- [ ] User-facing changes are documented in `CHANGELOG.md` when appropriate.
